YouTube — 560,633 Views

🎬 560K+ total views ⏱ 1,487 watch hours 📊 Zero paid promotion
Live Copywriting Sample

Hook. Script. Caption. All Mine.

This reel is one of Desi Kaanoon's highest-performing pieces. The hook, script structure, caption, and content strategy were crafted by me — designed to stop the scroll within 2 seconds and drive saves.

Opening Hook (written by me)
"Aapko pata hai Supreme Court ne kya kaha? — Ab yeh jaanna aapka haq hai."
Caption Strategy
Short punchy lead line → Legal insight simplified → CTA to save/share. Consistently drove 2× average saves vs. industry benchmark.
What This Proves
I can translate complex, technical topics into copy that normal audiences actually engage with — whether it's law, tech, or finance.
YouTube — Thumbnail Design & Video Storytelling

2+ years of building audience-first video content — scripting, editing, and designing every thumbnail from scratch.

Thumbnail Design

"This Video Can Change Virat Kohli's Life"

Trending topic angle — ring light framing, shock emoji layering, bold two-tone text. Designed to maximise CTR on a lifestyle topic. 100% made in Photoshop.

🎨 Photoshop compositing 📊 CTR optimisation 🔥 Trend leverage
Thumbnail Design

"MLM Ka CEO"

Multi-subject composition, luxury visual cues, contrast typography, emoji storytelling. Built to trigger curiosity and disgust simultaneously — a proven high-CTR formula.

🎨 Multi-layer composition 🧠 Clickbait psychology ✍️ Title copywriting

About

My Story

I'm an MBA candidate in Marketing & Analytics at IIIT Lucknow, with a passion for turning complex ideas into compelling copy.

Since 2021, I've written 500+ pieces of content — from legal articles to social captions, video scripts, and brand messaging. I work with the understanding that audience first, narrative second drives engagement and measurable impact.

As sole content manager at Desi Kaanoon (100K followers ✓), I drove 200% engagement growth and 3× organic reach while making Supreme Court rulings accessible to everyday people. On YouTube, I built a channel to 560,633 views through content strategy, scripting, and thumbnail design alone.

🎯
Audience-First Mindset: I think about who will read/watch first, brand narrative second. This drives engagement and shareability.
📈
Data-Driven Optimization: I track metrics, A/B test copy, and iterate based on performance. Growth is measurable.
⚡
Deadline Discipline: Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality. 13 months of daily publishing — zero misses.
🤝
Cross-Functional Collaboration: Worked with Supreme Court lawyers, marketers, and founders. I adapt to any team.

Let's create something impactful.
